title: Section 33
content: 1[33. Power to issue interim orders.--Where during an inquiry, the Commission is satisfied that an act in contravention of sub-section (1) of section 3 or sub-section (1) of section 4 or section 6 has been committed and continues to be committed or that such act is about to be committed, the Commission may, by order, temporarily restrain any party from carrying on such act until the conclusion of such inquiry or until further orders, without giving notice to such party, where it deems it necessary.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 26, ibid., for section 33 (w.e.f. 20-5-2009).
